proposed.claim: Schema discipline: belief provenance is carried by an artifact field; contract-grade directives carry contract:true with non-empty rules/invariants; the implication field is absent; enum-shaped fields (kind, domain, artifact-scheme) take values from c039/c041/c043 respectively; kind binds allowed structural types via the kind-type derivation table.
rules: The artifact field is the canonical provenance carrier on beliefs. Its value is null or a string matching scheme:id where scheme is declared by c043.
The kind field's value is null or one of the values declared by c039.
The domain field's value is null or one of the values declared by c041.
The contract field is a boolean. It is allowed only on type: directive.
contract: true is required iff rules or invariants are non-empty (bidirectional).
The implication field is absent on all beliefs.
Beliefs with kind: action-item have type: directive, contract: false, and empty rules/invariants.
The four structural types are distinct and are not merged: a compound states exactly what its deps jointly state, an inference may exceed them, a directive prescribes.
Artifacts (external documents, threads, files) are not promoted to belief nodes; they are referenced via the artifact field only.
invariants: For all beliefs b: b.contract == true implies b.type == 'directive'.
For all beliefs b: ((b.rules // []) ++ (b.invariants // [])) non-empty iff b.contract == true.
For all beliefs b: b.artifact == null OR b.artifact matches /^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*:.+/.
For all beliefs b: b.kind == null OR b.kind is in c039.enum.
For all beliefs b: b.artifact == null OR scheme(b.artifact) is in c043.enum.
For all beliefs b: b.domain == null OR b.domain is in c041.enum.
For all beliefs b: b does not have an `implication` field.
For all beliefs b with b.kind == 'action-item': b.type == 'directive' AND b.contract != true AND (b.rules // []) is empty AND (b.invariants // []) is empty.

reasoning: cb-schema-v2: schema discipline restated for four types; contract attaches to directive; the stale c040 scheme-enum reference is corrected to its successor c043; the kind-type table joins the enum family.
